report.summary: Cycle-close ~1h delta from v4 — production stable on d3bce36; 1b4a15e build failure unchanged (AICourseRecommendations.tsx unescaped apostrophe root-caused); 289 pages live (+2 vs v4); PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 new learn guides queued; all 6 API routes healthy; Vercel Pro trial now 8 days.

sections.title: QA
items: ✅ Production stable — build safety net confirmed: ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, output:standalone all intact

🔴 CARRY-OVER: Vercel build FAILED for commit 1b4a15e — root cause now precisely identified: unescaped apostrophe in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96: `reason: 'Your Uniswap activity shows you're ready...'` — the `'` in `you're` terminates the single-quoted string, causing 17 downstream TS parse errors
⚠️ TypeScript errors: 57 total across 2 files — AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 errors, all from line 96 apostrophe) and structured-data.examples.ts (40 errors, carry-over)
✅ No NEW TypeScript error sources introduced this cycle vs v4 — same 2 files only
⚠️ Page audit: 100/289 published pages still missing page.tsx files — carry-over, unchanged
⚠️ PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items now queued — /learn/megaeth-guide and /learn/abstract-chain-guide — not yet promoted to production

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
✅ Cache TTLs confirmed: prices 60s, fear-greed 600s (10min), trending 300s (5min), market-dominance 300s, defi-yields 300s, market-metrics 60s response — all with stale-while-revalidate headers

⚠️ NEW OBSERVATION: market-metrics TTL mismatch — upstream fetches use revalidate:120 but Cache-Control response is s-maxage=60 (CACHE_TTL=60_000ms) — minor inconsistency, no user impact but upstreams cache longer than served
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting (checkRateLimit) still 0/6 routes — security gap open since Sprint 38
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA present in only 1/6 routes (market-dominance) — prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields remain unprotected on total API failure
✅ No rate limit errors, stale-cascade events, or API failures detected this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: ✅ Production running on d3bce36 (Day 15 publish batch) — site accessible, no error spikes detected

🔴 CARRY-OVER: Build 1b4a15e (Sprint 59 — ecosystem + courses) still FAILED — ecosystem/courses routes not in production; fix is now unblocked with root cause identified (1-line apostrophe fix in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96)
⚠️ Platform alert: Vercel Pro trial expires in 8 days (was 9 last cycle) — countdown active, payment method required
⚠️ Dubai region (dxb1) still unavailable — Vercel auto-routing traffic, no user-facing impact
✅ Build safety net confirmed: ignoreBuildErrors:true prevents production outage from TS errors
✅ No new deployment failures or performance regressions observed this cycle

sections.title: Project Manager
items: ✅ LIVE: 289 pages in production (+2 vs v4's 287) — 2 new pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES this cycle
⚠️ QUEUE: 2 learn guides ready for next promotion — /learn/megaeth-guide and /learn/abstract-chain-guide

🔴 BLOCKER #1: Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 — change `you're` to `you're` or escape apostrophe — 1-line fix unblocks Sprint 59 ecosystem + courses (176 dApps, courses hub) from reaching production
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting 0/6 routes — unimplemented since Sprint 38, increasing risk as organic traffic approaches
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data 1/6 routes — resilience gap ahead of organic traffic window
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: 100 pages in published-pages.ts without page.tsx — audit needed

📌 ACTION for Jefe: (1) 1-line fix in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 to unblock Sprint 59, (2) Add Vercel payment method within 8 days, (3) Prioritize rate limiting sprint before organic traffic arrives
